title: chloroxylon swietenia
intro: Chloroxylon swietenia, also known as East Indian sandalwood, is a tropical tree native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia, valued for its fragrant and durable heartwood. The medicinal properties of Chloroxylon swietenia include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of using East Indian sandalwood include stress relief, improved sleep quality, and skin health, due to its calming and soothing effects. East Indian sandalwood is typically used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat a range of ailments.
